title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi is a regulated financial exchange founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara that enables prediction markets on real-world events. After four years of regulatory battles including a lawsuit against government oversight, the company achieved a $22 billion valuation and scaled rapidly to millions of customers and billions in volume.
